subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! The detailed letter from that steadfast one, firm in the Testament, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست پیمانه پیمان نامه مفصل آن ثابت عهد و راسخ میثاق واصل گردید از ورود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
